name: Chaldean mafia
description: The Chaldean mafia is a collective of criminal organizations composed of Chaldeans that emerged in the United States during the 1980s. It is active primarily in Detroit, as well as San Diego and Phoenix. The groups are involved in murder, arson, weapons trafficking, narcotics trafficking, money laundering, fraud, theft, counterfeiting, racketeering, alien smuggling, assault, kidnapping, and armed robbery.
